changelog: New: WeTV / Tencent Video (wetv.vip, v.qq.com) — download dramas and movies
New: WeTV series scraping — paste a series URL to queue all episodes automatically
New: WeTV uses built-in Chromium browser to intercept HLS stream — works for premium content
New: Facebook videos now download without login for public pages
Fix: Auto-update now reliable on Windows 11 — logs steps to %TEMP%\ug_update_log.txt
